ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apartments" (
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each apartment */,
  "apartment_number" TEXT /* Number of the apartment */,
  "sq_ft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the apartment */,
  "rent_min" INTEGER /* Minimum rent price of the apartment */,
  "rent_max" INTEGER /* Maximum rent price of the apartment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the apartment */,
  "action" TEXT /* Available actions for the apartment (e.g., view location, select apartment) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the apartment */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the apartment */,
  "floor" INTEGER /* Floor number of the apartment */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the apartment is located */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status of the apartment (e.g., available, occupied, under maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the apartment's information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the apartment */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the apartment */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs or paths to images of the apartment */,
  "lease_term" TEXT /* Length of the lease term (e.g., 6 months, 1 year) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the apartment */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the apartment has been viewed */,
  "interest_level" TEXT /* Level of interest in the apartment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apartment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apartments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing roles */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users */,
  "apartment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing apartments */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, select, update) */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_apartment_id FOREIGN KEY ("apartment_id") REFERENCES apartments ("apartment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., rental trends, availability) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
